# cortexcloud_compliance_control (Resource)

Manages a compliance control.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Custom compliance control
resource "cortexcloud_compliance_control" "access_control" {
  name        = "Custom Access Control Policy"
  category    = "Access Control"
  subcategory = "AC-1"
  description = "Enforce access control policies and procedures"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) The category of the compliance control.
- `name` (String) The name of the compliance control.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the compliance control.
- `subcategory` (String) The subcategory of the compliance control. Defaults to an empty string if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `category_description` (String) The description of the category.
- `created_by` (String) The user who created the control.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the control is enabled.
- `id` (String) The ID of the compliance control.
- `insertion_time` (Number) The insertion timestamp of the control.
- `is_custom` (Boolean) Whether the control is custom.
- `modification_time` (Number) The modification timestamp of the control.
- `modified_by` (String) The user who last modified the control.
- `severity` (String) The severity level of the control.
- `standards` (List of String) The list of standards this control belongs to.
- `subcategory_description` (String) The description of the subcategory.
- `supported` (Boolean) Whether the control is supported.
